title: Pride in Penhill Survey – Will Stone MP
text_excerpt: Pride in Penhill Survey – Will Stone MP Home News Newsletter Pride in Penhill Survey Get In Touch Pride in Penhill Survey Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. This questionnaire is to make sure that the Pride in Place Programme reflects what you, the residents of Penhill want from the £20m. As your MP I am committed to making sure your voice gets heard and the community, not politicians make the decisions. Name * First Last Address * Address Line 1 Address Line 2 City State / Province / Region Postal Code Email * What do you enjoy most about living here? Which 3 matter most to you? * Fixing local roads, pavements and cycle tracks Improving public transport Dealing with crime and antisocial behaviour Culture, leisure and sports facilities like youth clubs, libraries or Community centres Playgrounds and parks Activities for teenagers Local health services More homes for local people Skills, education and training opportunities for local people Childcare for local children, training and education opportunities, support for children with special educational needs How would you like to see the £20m spent? * What 2 things would you like to see more of? * Street Cleaning & Rubbish pick up Improving access to & repairing paths Community events for Young People Murals and Art Community Events for 65+ Sign cleaning Community Events for 25 – 65 Are there any local organisations / groups / businesses you would like to be represented on the community board? organisations most I will be in regular contact with people of Penhill and communicating through my social media channels to keep you updated on progress and get your feedback every step of the way. We also need local people to be members of Pride in Penhill’s community board, which will be responsible for listening to local feedback and planning how the community’s £20 million is spent. Do you want to receive updates from Will Stone MP on the progress of the Pride in Place Programme (Opt out at any time by sending your name and address to Will.stone.mp@parliament.uk) * — Select Choice — Yes No Do you want to be contacted about volunteering for the community board? * — Select Choice — Yes No Submit Pinetrees Community Centre, The Circle, Swindon, SN2 1RF 01793 540040 will@willstone.org.uk Links Standards Policy Privacy Policy Socials Facebook LinkedIn Instagram Bluesky YouTube TikTok © 2025 Will Stone MP
